title: Trump: Send National Guard to SF, China Rare Earths Trade War, AI's PR Crisis
description:
(0:00) Bestie intros! Dreamforce and another interesting conference take the Bay Area

(3:35) State of crime in SF, do they need the National Guard?

(20:48) US to impose price floors after China puts export controls on rare earths, can America on-shore a full-stack rare earth industry?

(36:15) State of US-China ahead of the Trump-Xi meeting, how we got here, China's elite mercantilism and strong economic history

(52:59) AI PR crisis: Recent datacenters get denied

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses Trump's suggestion to send the National Guard to San Francisco, the US-China trade war over rare earths, and the AI PR crisis. The hosts also delve into the state of US-China relations ahead of the Trump-Xi meeting and the potential for America to on-shore a full-stack rare earth industry. The episode concludes with a discussion on the recent datacenter denials and their implications.

takeaways.text: Trump suggests sending National Guard to SF
US to impose price floors on rare earths
China's export controls on rare earths escalate trade war
America may on-shore rare earth industry
AI PR crisis worsens with datacenter denials
US-China relations tense ahead of Trump-Xi meeting
China's elite mercantilism drives economic growth

sentiment.notes: The hosts express concern over the escalating trade war and the AI PR crisis, but also discuss potential opportunities for America to on-shore its rare earth industry.

notable_moments.description: Trump suggests sending National Guard to SF
US to impose price floors on rare earths
Discussion on US-China relations ahead of Trump-Xi meeting
